subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God, render thanks that thou art sheltered beneath the protection of the servant of the Divine Threshold, His Holiness who is worthy of bounties and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امه الله حمد کن که در ظل عصمت بنده آستان احدیت حضرت قابلی که قابل الطاف و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
